title: Create City 3 NewAge
description:
Create City 3 NewAge
by FGS / The Tech Crafter
body: "Create City 3: New Age" is an annual community project by FGS (Friends Community Server). This modpack focuses primarily on the Create mod and Timeless and Classics, offering a unique gameplay experience. Additionally, the modpack is performance-optimized for smoother gameplay. Anti-cheat programs are in place, and a touch of realism has also been added to enhance the experience. This project is also expected to take place on Thursday the 13th.
